parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ profiles: [$json.handle], resultsPerPage: $json.max_videos, shouldDownloadVideos: false, shouldDownloadCovers: false, shouldDownloadSubtitles: false, proxyConfiguration: { useApifyProxy: true, apifyProxyGroups: ["RESIDENTIAL"] } }) }}
={{ ({ targetUrls: [$json.handle], maxPosts: $json.max_videos, includeReposts: false, includeQuotePosts: true, scrapeReactions: false, scrapeComments: false }) }}

={{ ({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.new_concepts_instruction + '

=== REFERENCE POST ===
Competitor: @' + $json.competitor_name + '
Platform: ' + $json.platform + '
Views: ' + $json.views + '
Likes: ' + $json.likes + '
Posted: ' + $json.date_posted + '
Link: ' + $json.link + ($json.analysis && $json.analysis.trim() ? '

Content analysis:
' + $json.analysis : '

[Video analysis unavailable — base concepts on brand context and engagement metrics above]') }] }) }}

meta.notes: MULTI-PLATFORM competitor intelligence pipeline. Trigger: POST /sm-pipeline with { brand_id, max_videos?, top_k?, n_days? }. Reads competitors + active platforms from brand_profiles.data_json. Competitor fields: instagram_url, tiktok_url, linkedin_url, twitter_url/x_url. Active platforms: data_json.channels[].name. Skips platforms the brand is NOT on. Video platforms (IG/TikTok): downloads video → Gemini analysis → Claude concepts. Text platforms (LinkedIn/Twitter): extracts hook from post text → Claude concepts. Saves to sm_videos with brand_id, competitor_name, platform fields. SUPABASE: add columns platform (text), competitor_name (text), brand_id (uuid), shares (int) to sm_videos if not present. Twitter actor: apidojo~tweet-scraper — adjust actor name if unavailable on your Apify plan. LinkedIn actor: harvestapi~linkedin-company-posts ($2/1k). TikTok actor: clockworks~tiktok-scraper.
